tasks.label: wait: auth-service
tasks.command: until curl -sf http://localhost:3001/.well-known/health; do echo 'Waiting for auth-service...'; sleep 2; done; echo 'auth-service ready'

windows.command: powershell -Command "while ($true) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/.well-known/health' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { Write-Host 'auth-service ready'; break } } catch { Write-Host 'Waiting for auth-service...'; Start-Sleep 2 } }"

tasks.label: wait: chat-service
tasks.command: until curl -sf http://localhost:3002/.well-known/health; do echo 'Waiting for chat-service...'; sleep 2; done; echo 'chat-service ready'

windows.command: powershell -Command "while ($true) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3002/.well-known/health' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { Write-Host 'chat-service ready'; break } } catch { Write-Host 'Waiting for chat-service...'; Start-Sleep 2 } }"
